blended.narrative: Mont Orford is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,956 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
